description: You are an instructional designer at a university preparing a lecture recording for accessible online distribution under Section 508 compliance requirements. Using the lecture video at /home/ga/Videos/lecture_recording.mp4, the transcript at /home/ga/Documents/lecture_transcript.txt, and the accessibility requirements in /home/ga/Documents/accessibility_spec.txt, create a timed SRT closed caption file, a hardsubbed video copy with burned-in captions, a 480p resolution version, and section thumbnail images. Export all deliverables to /home/ga/Documents/output/ and create a manifest file at /home/ga/Documents/manifest.txt.
